Class AuxiliaryContractBuilders.VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.AuxiliaryContractBuilders.VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar
Enclosing class:
AuxiliaryContractBuilders
public static final class AuxiliaryContractBuilders.VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar extends Object
This class contains methods to create new variables from the contract's placeholder variables (see AuxiliaryContract.getPlaceholderVariables()), and register them.

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    createAndRegisterCopies(String suffix)
    Creates and registers copies of the remembrance variables and heaps.

  • Constructor Details

    • VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar

      public VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar(@NonNull Goal goal, AuxiliaryContract.Variables placeholderVariables)
      Parameters:
      goal - If this is not null, all created variables are added to it. If it is null, the variables are instead added to the services' namespace.
      placeholderVariables - the placeholders from which to create the variables.

    • VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar

      public VariablesCreatorAndRegistrar(@NonNull Services services, AuxiliaryContract.Variables placeholderVariables)
      Parameters:
      services - services.
      placeholderVariables - the placeholders from which to create the variables.

  • Method Details

    • createAndRegister

      public AuxiliaryContract.Variables createAndRegister(JTerm self, boolean existingPO)
      Parameters:
      self - the self term
      existingPO - true if we are applying a rule in an existing proof obligation, false if we are creating a new proof obligation.
      Returns:
      the registered variables.

    • createAndRegister

      public AuxiliaryContract.Variables createAndRegister(JTerm self, boolean existingPO, ProgramElement pe)
      Parameters:
      self - the self term
      existingPO - true if we are applying a rule in an existing proof obligation, false if we are creating a new proof obligation.
      pe - if existingPO == false, all contracts on blocks in this program element will have their remembrance variables replaced by the one created here.
      Returns:
      the registered variables.

    • createAndRegisterCopies

      public AuxiliaryContract.Variables createAndRegisterCopies(String suffix)
      Creates and registers copies of the remembrance variables and heaps.
      Parameters:
      suffix - a suffix for the new variables' names.
      Returns:
      a AuxiliaryContract.Variables object containing the new ProgramVariables.
